title: Test builds book path with string(rune('0'+bookID)), only valid for IDs 1-9
evidence: server_test.go:137,171,185,208,212 — GET/PUT/DELETE paths use string(rune('0'+bookID)) instead of strconv.Itoa; breaks for two-digit IDs
suggestion: Use strconv.Itoa(int(bookID)) or fmt.Sprintf to build the path

title: Year required (year>0) beyond spec, which only mandates title and author
evidence: server.go:192-196,267-271 rejects year<=0 with 400; TASK.md/R9 require only title and author
suggestion: Relax year/isbn to optional or document the stricter contract

title: Unused gin-style binding:"required" struct tags on BookInput
evidence: server.go:28-31 — binding tags have no effect under net/http; validation is done manually
suggestion: Remove the binding tags to avoid implying a validation framework that isn't used

title: Route uses Go 1.22 {id} pattern but parses id via TrimPrefix+Atoi instead of r.PathValue
suggestion: Use r.PathValue("id") for clarity and to avoid subpath edge cases

title: ISBN uniqueness enforced with 409 Conflict (beyond spec)
evidence: server.go:21 unique tag; server.go:211-216,293-301 map UNIQUE violation to 409
suggestion: None — reasonable enhancement worth noting for cross-run comparison
